title: overlay2 is not supported overlayfs , storage-driver=overlay
body: **Description** I am trying to run docker in docker by using ctr on Photon linux kernel. The error is Devices "cgroup" is not mounted. The details are "overlay2 is not supported overlayfs , storage-driver=overlay" Anyone knows how to solve this problem

comments.body: You need to volume mount in /var/lib/containers into the buildah container.  BTW have you thought about using podman for this?

> You need to volume mount in /var/lib/containers into the buildah container. BTW have you thought about using podman for this?

Thanks! It works.
